steps.title: Find the scale factor from perimeters
steps.content:
For similar triangles, corresponding sides scale by the same factor as the perimeters. Divide the perimeter of $XYZ$ by the perimeter of $TUV$:
$$\frac{333}{37} = 9$$

steps.title: Apply scale factor to find XY
steps.content:
Since $TU$ corresponds to $XY$, multiply $TU$ by the scale factor:
$$XY = 18 \times 9 = 162$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
